meta.title: KiX Connect — Authorise
meta.description: Authorise a merchant to access your KiX account data. You can revoke at any time.
default_tagline: is requesting access to your KiX account
intro_prefix: wants to access the following data:
guarantee.revoke: You can revoke this authorisation at any time in the KiX app.
guarantee.privacy: Your password and personal identifiers are never shared with the merchant.
guarantee.scope: The merchant can only access data within the scopes you approve.
footer.note: KiX does not sell ads — merchants pay only for results.
scope.profile.title: View your basic profile
scope.history.title: View your KiX activity
scope.history.detail: Games played and rewards claimed (no password data)
scope.location.title: Notify you when nearby
scope.location.detail: Used for proximity offers from this merchant
scope.favorites.title: Understand your preferences
scope.email.title: Send you email
scope.phone.title: Send you SMS
scope.insights.title: Cross-merchant insights
error.not_logged_in: Please sign in to KiX before authorising.
integrations.title: External integrations
integrations.sub: Merchants connect KiX to their existing stack.
